title: Ability to edit docs in app (iPhone, Android, etc.)
excerpt: Please add the ability to edit docs in the app - currently, we use notes to take notes for meetings, including checklists of things to cover. It would be extremely helpful to  be able to edit these notes during the meeti…

posts.author: cbrunskill (Catherine Brunskill)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the ability to edit docs in the app - currently, we use notes to take notes for meetings, including checklists of things to cover. It would be extremely helpful to be able to edit these notes during the meetings themselves - without the ability to edit in real time in the meeting, the usability and benefit of using docs in Monday.com is severely hindered.
